items.headline: Bunge Global Cash Strain Raises Dilution Risks Despite Valuation Upside
items.summary: Investors are focusing on Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) after the company reported negative free cash flow alongside declining earnings. Concerns are growing that continued weak cash generation, despite solid sales levels, could lead to equity financing and potential shareholder dilution. The news puts fresh attention on Bunge Global's liquidity position and the trade off between funding needs and protecting existing shareholders.
